---
title: "proposal_strategy_eval_followup"
format: gfm
---

# Summary

- proposal id: `proposal_strategy_eval_followup_abc123`
- source owner: `experiment_run:experiment_strategy_eval_example`
- governance scope: `research_only`
- runtime effect: `advisory_only`
- status: `proposed`

# Hypothesis

Restricting the governed challenger comparison to long-friendly regimes will
improve stability without widening runtime authority.

# Metrics

- `positive_expectancy`: `0.0`
- `rows_test`: `16`

# Next Test

Run `governed_challengers_v1` against a long-friendly-only cohort and compare
the resulting paper-cycle alignment packet.
